comments.author: @JerryMabrey
comments.text: It was very nice but then you guys showed the electric windmills and that part is ugly and it ruined it for me.

comments.author: @tropicaltravel
comments.text: This is one of the few videos about Norway that actually feels honest instead of just showing the postcard version. Really enjoyed the balanced perspective.

replies.author: @BestTravel2
replies.text: I’m so glad you appreciated the balanced perspective; it was important to me to show the reality beyond the postcards!

comments.author: @NguoiVietSongXaQue
comments.text: I am in love with this! The breathtaking visuals and the magical soundtrack make it so engaging and truly memorable.

replies.author: @BestTravel2
replies.text: So glad you loved it! I really enjoyed putting this one together, and I'm happy the visuals and soundtrack resonated with you.

comments.author: @forgottencampingsecrets
comments.text: this is a place with tales as old as yore.

comments.author: @TopUnrealPlanet4K
comments.text: There’s something deeply captivating about the atmosphere in this video. The storytelling respects the viewer’s curiosity and allows the mystery to breathe instead of rushing through it. That subtle approach creates an experience that feels authentic, cinematic, and emotionally powerful all at once. It’s the kind of content that stays with you for hours afterward. If anyone else feels drawn toward that same sense of discovery, we recently explored a place on our channel that reveals even more surprising and hidden stories.

replies.author: @BestTravel2
replies.text: I'm so glad the atmosphere and storytelling resonated with you, and that it created such an authentic, cinematic, and emotionally powerful experience!

comments.author: @EpicEarthYTB
comments.text: Norway’s natural beauty is truly breathtaking. From the majestic fjords to the magical Northern Lights, this country looks like a paradise for nature lovers!

replies.author: @BestTravel2
replies.text: It truly is! I'm so glad I could capture some of that breathtaking beauty for you all.

comments.author: @lorenzowittig
comments.text:
even with all the negatives we made the decision laat year to to move to norway. This still takes a while as we need to get a lot of things in order. However we plan to fully integrate the culture and respect the full norwegian lifestyle. 

Every country has its pros and cons. It is just important what is important to you and make sure to fully integrate and speak the language. Do not move somewhere expecting to live your previous lifestyle in another country.

comments.author: @Aventurex-686
comments.text: Norway’s beauty is undeniable, but what’s beneath the surface is where the real jaw-dropping elements are. The sheer scale of this country is unreal.

comments.author: @Anthony-x6j7s
comments.text: Stunning visuals and an excellent choice of background music.

comments.author: @christopherdeering9070
comments.text: Absolutely  stunning & nice choice soundtrack for the start of the video called soul temple.

comments.author: @GlobeVistaTV
comments.text: Norway looks peaceful, but this video shows there’s so much more beneath the beauty.
